name: Greek-Style Stuffed Peppers
method: Heat the oil over moderate heat in a large pan.
Insert fennel and onions; continue cooking for ten minutes until soft.
Add the garlic and veggies; cook for one minute longer. Mildly cool.
Break the peppers and save the tops; extract and discard the seeds.
Pour 1 cup of chopped tomatoes into the 6- or 7-quarter rim.
Combine the lamb, rye, 1 cup of feta cheese, olives, and spices in a
large mixing bowl; add the mixture of fennel.
Mix the spoon into the peppers; place in a slow cooker.
Pour the remainder of the crushed tomatoes over the peppers; replace
Cook, wrapped, until peppers are soft, 4 to 5 hours on medium.
Serve with extra feta and minced parsley if needed.
